Subject: Request for Brief Extension on Contract Review Deadline

Dear [Opposing Counsel],

I hope this message finds you well. I'm writing to respectfully request a one-week extension of our current deadline for completing the review of the agreement. A small additional amount of time would allow us to give the document the careful attention it requires and to ensure that our response is thorough and constructive.

Please let me know at your earliest convenience if this adjustment works for your schedule, or if you would prefer to discuss alternative arrangements. Thank you for your time and consideration, and I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
